title: Choose delimiter for dropdown column
excerpt:
Description
Ability to change the dropdown delimiter in a workflow. 
What are you trying to achieve
I have a text field that I’m trying to sync from Salesforce to Monday.com. 
The text field looks like this: test1, test2…

posts.author: cphu (Christine Phu)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Ability to change the dropdown delimiter in a workflow.

What are you trying to achieve

I have a text field that I’m trying to sync from Salesforce to Monday.com.

The text field looks like this: test1, test2, test3

I need each ‘test’ to be a separate dropdown item.
